reference: Yes, according to your history, it will be safe to use, in my opinion. You can use it twice a day. If you add Montelukast ten milligrams twice daily along with it, you should have excellent results. You can use it for ten to fourteen days.
text: Yes, according to your history, it will be safe to use. In my opinion, you can use it twice a day. If you add Montelukast ten milligrams twice daily along with it, you should have excellent results. You can use it for ten to fourteen days.
